# Frolik + Co

> Frolik + Co is a founder-led interior design studio in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India (est. 2016). We design warm, functional, personality-filled interiors - homes, workspaces and commercial spaces - with a special understanding of children's rooms. Our signature strength is kids' spaces: bedrooms, playrooms, study rooms and shared sibling rooms designed to grow with the child. We offer design-only consultation through to full turnkey execution.

Key facts for anyone summarising or citing us:
- Studio: Frolik + Co (brand wordmark spelled "frolik", not "frolic").
- Location & service area: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India (projects also across Gujarat, e.g. Baroda).
- Discipline: residential, kids' spaces, workspace and commercial interior design; consultation to turnkey.
- Contact: hello@frolik.co.in · Instagram @frolikncodesigns.
- Positioning: "grown-up craft with a child's sense of play" - all interiors, with a special understanding of children. Not a kids-only brand.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://frolik.co.in/): Studio overview, signature work and approach.
- [Work - portfolio](https://frolik.co.in/work.html): Interior design projects across Ahmedabad - kids' rooms, homes, studios and commercial spaces.
- [Kids' spaces](https://frolik.co.in/kids-spaces.html): Our specialism - kids' room, playroom, study and shared-room design for imagination, safety, storage and calm.
- [Services](https://frolik.co.in/services.html): Residential, kids' spaces, workspace and commercial design, from consultation to turnkey execution.
- [Process](https://frolik.co.in/process.html): How we plan, design, build and style every space, discovery to handover.
- [About](https://frolik.co.in/about.html): The founder-led Ahmedabad studio behind the work.
- [Journal](https://frolik.co.in/journal.html): Guides and stories on kids' rooms, Ahmedabad homes, colour and storage.
- [Contact](https://frolik.co.in/contact.html): Start a project or book a discovery call.

## Services
- [Residential interiors](https://frolik.co.in/services/residential-interiors.html): Full homes, apartments, bungalows and renovations - space plan to turnkey handover.
- [Kids' space design](https://frolik.co.in/services/kids-spaces.html): Bedrooms, playrooms, study rooms and nurseries designed to grow with the child.
- [Commercial & studio interiors](https://frolik.co.in/services/commercial-studio-interiors.html): Offices, creative studios, retail and cafés fitted out to feel like your brand.
- [Design consultation](https://frolik.co.in/services/design-consultation.html): Layout, colour, furniture and material guidance with drawings - design only, no execution.
- [Turnkey execution](https://frolik.co.in/services/turnkey-execution.html): We design, build the custom furniture, coordinate vendors and hand over a finished space.
- [Styling & decor](https://frolik.co.in/services/styling-decor.html): The final-mile layer of furniture, soft furnishings, art and greenery.

## Kids' spaces landing pages
- [Kids' bedrooms](https://frolik.co.in/kids-spaces/kids-bedrooms.html): Calm sleep, clever storage and grow-with-me detailing.
- [Playrooms](https://frolik.co.in/kids-spaces/playrooms.html): Open floor to move, zones that tidy themselves, wipeable and soft materials.
- [Study rooms](https://frolik.co.in/kids-spaces/study-rooms.html): Good light, sound ergonomics, real focus and storage for books and supplies.
- [Shared sibling rooms](https://frolik.co.in/kids-spaces/shared-sibling-rooms.html): Two identities in one room - fair zoning, equal storage and sleep planning.

## Selected projects
- [The Coral Joy](https://frolik.co.in/work/the-coral-joy.html): A pastel kids' room in Ahmedabad with a bunk, slide, study zone and grow-with storage.
- [The Monochromatic Room](https://frolik.co.in/work/the-monochromatic-room.html): A neutral, natural-material kids' room that stays calm and grows quietly with the child.
- [The Purple Play Room](https://frolik.co.in/work/the-purple-play-room.html): A children's playroom planned to feel playful and imaginative without tipping into chaos.
- [The Playhouse Loft](https://frolik.co.in/work/the-playhouse-loft.html): A three-bedroom family home that keeps a sense of play in the grown-up rooms too.
- [Clay & Co. Café](https://frolik.co.in/work/clay-co-cafe.html): A warm neighbourhood café in Ahmedabad where the material palette does the talking.
- [Studio Marigold](https://frolik.co.in/work/studio-marigold.html): A creative workspace in Baroda designed for focus and warmth.

## Journal
- [How to design a kids' room that grows with your child](https://frolik.co.in/journal/kids-room-that-grows-with-your-child.html): Zoning, adaptable furniture, calm palettes, safe details and storage at child height.
- [Kids' room interior design in Ahmedabad: cost, timeline & planning](https://frolik.co.in/journal/kids-room-interior-design-ahmedabad-cost-timeline.html): What drives cost, realistic timelines, design-only vs turnkey, and how to plan.
- [Inside a Frolik + Co project: brief to handover](https://frolik.co.in/journal/inside-a-frolik-project-brief-to-handover.html): The five steps from discovery to handover and what a client experiences at each.
